report:
EXECUTIVE SUMMARY: Kentucky-based vendors for collapsible plastic bulk containers include major manufacturers and local distributors. Examples are ORBIS (facilities in Bardstown and Georgetown), IPL Schoeller (Shelbyville), Top Line Containers (Louisville), and Fastenal (Louisville branch). These companies supply new and reconditioned collapsible bins and related material handling products.
METHODS: We used official sources (company contact and product pages, directories) to collect addresses, phones, and product lines. Data was verified against company sites and registries. Uncertain or missing information is marked "unspecified".
MERMAID LOCATION CHART:
flowchart LR
  subgraph KY[KY]
    LOU(Louisville area) --- BAR(Bardstown - ORBIS)
    LOU --- SHE(Shelbyville - IPL Schoeller)
    LOU --- GEO(Georgetown - ORBIS)
  end

vendors.product_notes: BulkPak collapsible bulk containers; ORBIS manufacturing facility.
vendors.verification_notes: Address and role per ORBIS locations; phone is corporate number (location page lists no local phone).

vendors.product_notes: BulkPak collapsible bulk containers; ORBIS manufacturing facility.
vendors.verification_notes: Address and role per ORBIS locations; phone is corporate number.

vendors.product_notes: Manufacturer of reusable transport packaging; produces Foldable Large Containers (knockdown bulk boxes).
vendors.verification_notes: Address and phone from IPL Schoeller U.S. locations page.

vendors.company_name: Top Line Containers (Top Line Material Handling)
vendors.product_notes: Resells new and reconditioned collapsible bulk containers and offers repair services.
vendors.verification_notes: Address and phone from company contact page.

vendors.product_notes: Industrial distributor branch; sells collapsible plastic bulk boxes.
vendors.verification_notes: Branch address and phone from Fastenal location page.
